title: LogicalOrCondition
description: LogicalOrCondition: Condition that contains a collection of nested conditions, of which at least one needs to be met for an object to be considered a pass.

Conditions.description: A collection of conditions to be evaluated in combination.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
